name: Codestral Mamba (7B)
note: First Mamba2-architecture code model from Mistral; linear-time inference, tested to 256K-token in-context retrieval, Apache 2.0.
tpsNote: Mamba2 quantization/support in llama.cpp was experimental and unstable at launch; state-space caching differs from transformer KV-cache VRAM scaling

results.notes: [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]
From the official HF model card's evaluation table; independently cross-confirmed against the identical table rendered from the official mistral.ai/news/codestral-mamba/ launch-blog chart image.

verificationNotes: Fetched mistral.ai/news/codestral-mamba/ directly: confirms 2024-07-16 release, Mamba2/linear-time architecture, Apache 2.0, tested to 256K-token in-context retrieval.
